narrative: US-Iran talks hit a snag as Tehran labels proposals excessive, introducing a geopolitical risk premium—gold higher +0.27%; equities +0.33%; DXY -0.02%; VIX 17.9. AUD/JPY at 113.961 anchors a G8 bilateral theme (1.026% spread) as hawkish RBA outlooks and +300bp carry favor AUD (+0.523% avg) over JPY (-0.504% avg). USD/JPY holds at 157.005 as 300bp Fed-BoJ carry persists despite intervention risks. Watch US CPI and PPI data this week for the next directional catalyst.
